requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substance Restriction — No EU-Style Horizontal RoHS in Zimbabwe
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——津巴布韦无欧盟式横向 RoHS
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——辛巴威無歐盟式橫向 RoHS

summary.en: Zimbabwe does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime that restricts specific hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment as a condition of market access. There is no Zimbabwe equivalent of Directive 2011/65/EU restricting lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, or the four phthalates across all EEE. Consequently, substance restriction is not, in itself, a standalone Zimbabwe market-access barrier for LED luminaires. However: (1) mercury content matters for lamp types because Zimbabwe is a Party to the Minamata Convention on Mercury, which phases down/out certain mercury-added lamps (mainly fluorescent) — LED products are inherently mercury-free and benefit from this, but importers should avoid restricted mercury-lamp categories; (2) individual customers, government tenders, or distributors may contractually require RoHS-type evidence (often IEC 62321 test data) even though no Zimbabwe law mandates it. Manufacturers should plainly state that compliance here is driven by the Minamata Convention (mercury) and by customer/tender requirements, not by a horizontal Zimbabwe RoHS statute.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦不实行将电气电子设备中特定有害物质限制作为市场准入条件的欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度。津巴布韦没有相当于指令 2011/65/EU 的、对所有 EEE 中铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 或四项邻苯二甲酸酯加以限制的制度。因此，物质限制本身并非 LED 灯具进入津巴布韦的独立市场准入壁垒。但：（1）汞含量对某些灯型有意义，因津巴布韦为《水俣公约》缔约方，对某些含汞灯（主要为荧光灯）实行逐步淘汰——LED 产品本身无汞并因此受益，但进口商应避免受限的含汞灯类别；（2）个别客户、政府招标或经销商可能在合同上要求 RoHS 类证据（常为 IEC 62321 检测数据），尽管津巴布韦法律并无强制。制造商应明确说明：此处的合规由《水俣公约》（汞）及客户/招标要求驱动，而非由津巴布韦横向 RoHS 法规驱动。
summary.zht: 辛巴威不實行將電氣電子設備中特定有害物質限制作為市場准入條件的歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度。辛巴威沒有相當於指令 2011/65/EU 的、對所有 EEE 中鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 或四項鄰苯二甲酸酯加以限制的制度。因此，物質限制本身並非 LED 燈具進入辛巴威的獨立市場准入壁壘。但：（1）汞含量對某些燈型有意義，因辛巴威為《水俁公約》締約方，對某些含汞燈（主要為熒光燈）實行逐步淘汰——LED 產品本身無汞並因此受益，但進口商應避免受限的含汞燈類別；（2）個別客戶、政府招標或經銷商可能在合同上要求 RoHS 類證據（常為 IEC 62321 檢測數據），儘管辛巴威法律並無強制。製造商應明確說明：此處的合規由《水俁公約》（汞）及客戶/招標要求驅動，而非由辛巴威橫向 RoHS 法規驅動。

standards_or_laws: No Zimbabwe horizontal RoHS statute equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU as of 2026
Minamata Convention on Mercury — Zimbabwe is a Party (phase-down of certain mercury-added lamps; LED products are inherently mercury-free)

summary.en: China's baseline is GB/T 26572-2011 (concentration limits for restricted substances in EEE — Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) and SJ/T 11364-2014 (China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure marking, orange/green label). China RoHS 2 is a disclosure-and-labelling regime for the Chinese market rather than a market-access substance ban; the four EU phthalates are not in the CN mandatory restricted list as of 2026. Chinese GB-based hazardous-substance documentation is China-specific and is not a Zimbabwe requirement.
summary.zh: 中国的基线是 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求——铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE）及 SJ/T 11364-2014（中国 RoHS 2 有害物质披露标识，橙/绿标签）。中国 RoHS 2 是面向中国市场的披露与标识制度，而非市场准入物质禁令；截至 2026 年，四项欧盟邻苯二甲酸酯不在中国强制限制清单。中国基于 GB 的有害物质文件为中国特有，并非津巴布韦要求。
summary.zht: 中國的基線是 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求——鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE）及 SJ/T 11364-2014（中國 RoHS 2 有害物質披露標識，橙/綠標籤）。中國 RoHS 2 是面向中國市場的披露與標識制度，而非市場准入物質禁令；截至 2026 年，四項歐盟鄰苯二甲酸酯不在中國強制限制清單。中國基於 GB 的有害物質文件為中國特有，並非辛巴威要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure marking

gap.en: Honest mapping: unlike the EU, Zimbabwe has no horizontal RoHS market-access barrier, so the China-vs-target substance gap is largely moot for legal entry. Practical points: (1) the China RoHS disclosure label (SJ/T 11364) is China-specific and neither required nor sufficient for Zimbabwe; (2) the only hard substance driver is mercury via the Minamata Convention — LED products are mercury-free and unaffected, but the importer should not bundle restricted mercury fluorescent lamps; (3) where a Zimbabwe customer or tender contractually asks for RoHS-type assurance, provide IEC 62321 test data, but this is a commercial, not a statutory, requirement. Do not present a CCC certificate or China RoHS label as Zimbabwe substance compliance.
gap.zh: 诚实映射：与欧盟不同，津巴布韦没有横向 RoHS 市场准入壁垒，因此中国与目标市场的物质差距在合法进入层面基本无关紧要。实务要点：（1）中国 RoHS 披露标识（SJ/T 11364）为中国特有，对津巴布韦既非必需亦不充分；（2）唯一硬性物质驱动因素是经《水俣公约》的汞——LED 产品无汞、不受影响，但进口商不应捆绑受限的含汞荧光灯；（3）当津巴布韦客户或招标在合同上要求 RoHS 类保证时，提供 IEC 62321 检测数据，但这是商业要求而非法定要求。不要将 CCC 证书或中国 RoHS 标识作为津巴布韦物质合规呈现。
gap.zht: 誠實映射：與歐盟不同，辛巴威沒有橫向 RoHS 市場准入壁壘，因此中國與目標市場的物質差距在合法進入層面基本無關緊要。實務要點：（1）中國 RoHS 披露標識（SJ/T 11364）為中國特有，對辛巴威既非必需亦不充分；（2）唯一硬性物質驅動因素是經《水俁公約》的汞——LED 產品無汞、不受影響，但進口商不應捆綁受限的含汞熒光燈；（3）當辛巴威客戶或招標在合同上要求 RoHS 類保證時，提供 IEC 62321 檢測數據，但這是商業要求而非法定要求。不要將 CCC 證書或中國 RoHS 標識作為辛巴威物質合規呈現。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — no EU-style horizontal RoHS statute in Zimbabwe as of 2026; substance restriction driven only by the Minamata Convention (mercury, not applicable to LED) and by customer / tender contract terms
mandatory_status.cn: Disclosure regime — China RoHS 2 (GB/T 26572 + SJ/T 11364) requires hazardous-substance disclosure labelling for the Chinese market; not a market-access ban

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zimbabwe has no EU-style horizontal RoHS market-access regime, so substance restriction is not a standalone barrier for LED luminaires. The only binding substance driver is mercury under the Minamata Convention — LED products are inherently mercury-free and unaffected. China RoHS disclosure labels and CCC certificates are China-specific and are not Zimbabwe evidence. Provide IEC 62321 data only where a customer or tender contractually requires it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 津巴布韦没有欧盟式横向 RoHS 市场准入制度，故物质限制并非 LED 灯具的独立壁垒。唯一具约束力的物质驱动因素是《水俣公约》下的汞——LED 产品本身无汞、不受影响。中国 RoHS 披露标识及 CCC 证书为中国特有，不构成津巴布韦证据。仅在客户或招标合同要求时提供 IEC 62321 数据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 辛巴威沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS 市場准入制度，故物質限制並非 LED 燈具的獨立壁壘。唯一具約束力的物質驅動因素是《水俁公約》下的汞——LED 產品本身無汞、不受影響。中國 RoHS 披露標識及 CCC 證書為中國特有，不構成辛巴威證據。僅在客戶或招標合同要求時提供 IEC 62321 數據。

requirement_topic.en: Chemicals / REACH-Type Obligations — No Zimbabwe Equivalent
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品 / REACH 类义务——津巴布韦无对应
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品 / REACH 類義務——辛巴威無對應

summary.en: Zimbabwe has no equivalent of the EU REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification obligation, and no ECHA-style Candidate List or SCIP database. There is no Zimbabwe legal duty to proactively notify B2B customers or consumers when an article contains a Substance of Very High Concern above 0.1% w/w. General chemical and environmental management in Zimbabwe is administered through the Environmental Management Agency (EMA) under the Environmental Management Act and hazardous-substances regulations, which govern handling, storage, transport, and disposal of hazardous chemicals rather than substance-in-article notification for finished EEE. As a result, REACH-type SVHC tracking is not a Zimbabwe market-access requirement for LED luminaires — it may still arise as a customer / multinational-buyer contractual condition.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦没有相当于欧盟 REACH 法规（EC）1907/2006 第 33 条 SVHC 供应链通报义务的制度，也没有 ECHA 式候选清单或 SCIP 数据库。津巴布韦没有在物品中 SVHC 超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户或消费者的法定义务。津巴布韦的一般化学品与环境管理由环境管理局（EMA）依据《环境管理法》及危险物质法规执行，规范危险化学品的处理、储存、运输和处置，而非对成品 EEE 进行物品中物质通报。因此，REACH 类 SVHC 跟踪并非 LED 灯具进入津巴布韦的市场准入要求——其仍可能作为客户/跨国买方的合同条件出现。
summary.zht: 辛巴威沒有相當於歐盟 REACH 法規（EC）1907/2006 第 33 條 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務的制度，也沒有 ECHA 式候選清單或 SCIP 數據庫。辛巴威沒有在物品中 SVHC 超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶或消費者的法定義務。辛巴威的一般化學品與環境管理由環境管理局（EMA）依據《環境管理法》及危險物質法規執行，規範危險化學品的處理、儲存、運輸和處置，而非對成品 EEE 進行物品中物質通報。因此，REACH 類 SVHC 跟蹤並非 LED 燈具進入辛巴威的市場准入要求——其仍可能作為客戶/跨國買方的合同條件出現。

standards_or_laws: No Zimbabwe equivalent to REACH (EC) 1907/2006 Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification as of 2026; no Candidate List / SCIP database
Environmental Management Act (Zimbabwe) / EMA hazardous-substances regulations — handling/storage/disposal of chemicals, not article-level SVHC notification

summary.en: China likewise has no direct equivalent to REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC notification. The closest CN instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (2020) on new chemical substance environmental management registration and GB 30981 / GB 13690 for hazardous-chemical classification and labelling. Neither China nor Zimbabwe imposes a REACH-style proactive B2B SVHC notification duty for finished LED articles, so this is an EU-specific obligation absent in both the source and target markets.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH 第 33 条物品级 SVHC 通报的制度。最接近的中国工具是生态环境部令第 12 号（2020）关于新化学物质环境管理登记，以及 GB 30981 / GB 13690 危险化学品分类和标签。中国与津巴布韦均不对成品 LED 物品强制 REACH 式主动 B2B SVHC 通报义务，故此为欧盟特有义务，在源市场与目标市场均不存在。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH 第 33 條物品級 SVHC 通報的制度。最接近的中國工具是生態環境部令第 12 號（2020）關於新化學物質環境管理登記，以及 GB 30981 / GB 13690 危險化學品分類和標籤。中國與辛巴威均不對成品 LED 物品強制 REACH 式主動 B2B SVHC 通報義務，故此為歐盟特有義務，在源市場與目標市場均不存在。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981 / GB 13690 — classification and labelling of hazardous chemicals (China)

gap.en: Honest mapping: REACH SVHC supply-chain notification is an EU-specific obligation with no equivalent in either China or Zimbabwe. For Zimbabwe market entry there is no SVHC notification, no Candidate List screening, and no SCIP registration duty. Practical points: (1) do not treat REACH SVHC tracking as a Zimbabwe legal requirement; (2) EMA chemical regulations focus on handling/disposal of hazardous chemicals, not substance-in-article disclosure for finished luminaires; (3) multinational buyers or export-oriented tenders may still impose SVHC declarations contractually — in that case maintain the same supply-chain screening used for EU shipments. The absence of a target-market obligation should be stated plainly rather than implying a barrier that does not exist.
gap.zh: 诚实映射：REACH SVHC 供应链通报是欧盟特有义务，中国与津巴布韦均无对应。就津巴布韦市场进入而言，无 SVHC 通报、无候选清单筛查、无 SCIP 注册义务。实务要点：（1）不要将 REACH SVHC 跟踪视为津巴布韦法定要求；（2）EMA 化学品法规聚焦危险化学品的处理/处置，而非成品灯具的物品中物质披露；（3）跨国买方或出口导向招标仍可能在合同上要求 SVHC 声明——此时沿用与欧盟出货相同的供应链筛查。应明确说明目标市场不存在该义务，而非暗示一个并不存在的壁垒。
gap.zht: 誠實映射：REACH SVHC 供應鏈通報是歐盟特有義務，中國與辛巴威均無對應。就辛巴威市場進入而言，無 SVHC 通報、無候選清單篩查、無 SCIP 註冊義務。實務要點：（1）不要將 REACH SVHC 跟蹤視為辛巴威法定要求；（2）EMA 化學品法規聚焦危險化學品的處理/處置，而非成品燈具的物品中物質披露；（3）跨國買方或出口導向招標仍可能在合同上要求 SVHC 聲明——此時沿用與歐盟出貨相同的供應鏈篩查。應明確說明目標市場不存在該義務，而非暗示一個並不存在的壁壘。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — no REACH-style article-level SVHC notification, Candidate List, or SCIP obligation in Zimbabwe as of 2026; may arise only as a customer / buyer contract term
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China has no REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC notification duty either

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zimbabwe has no REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification, Candidate List, or SCIP obligation, and neither does China — this is an EU-specific duty absent in both markets. EMA chemical rules cover handling and disposal of hazardous chemicals, not article-level substance disclosure for finished LED luminaires. SVHC declarations may still be requested by multinational buyers contractually, but they are not a Zimbabwe market-access requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 津巴布韦没有 REACH 式 SVHC 供应链通报、候选清单或 SCIP 义务，中国亦无——此为欧盟特有义务，在两个市场均不存在。EMA 化学品规则涵盖危险化学品的处理与处置，而非成品 LED 灯具的物品级物质披露。跨国买方仍可能在合同上要求 SVHC 声明，但其并非津巴布韦市场准入要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 辛巴威沒有 REACH 式 SVHC 供應鏈通報、候選清單或 SCIP 義務，中國亦無——此為歐盟特有義務，在兩個市場均不存在。EMA 化學品規則涵蓋危險化學品的處理與處置，而非成品 LED 燈具的物品級物質披露。跨國買方仍可能在合同上要求 SVHC 聲明，但其並非辛巴威市場准入要求。

requirement_topic.en: Import Conformity, Documentation and In-Country Importer (SAZ / customs route)
requirement_topic.zh: 进口合格评定、文件与在地进口商（SAZ / 海关路径）
requirement_topic.zht: 進口合格評定、文件與在地進口商（SAZ / 海關路徑）

summary.en: Because Zimbabwe is landlocked, LED luminaires from China are typically shipped via the ports of Durban (South Africa) or Beira (Mozambique) and trucked in, then cleared through the Zimbabwe Revenue Authority (ZIMRA). For regulated product categories, SAZ conformity-assessment or import-inspection arrangements may apply at or before importation; the practical documentation set commonly includes the IEC/ZWS-based safety and emission test reports (IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / CISPR 15 / IEC 62471), performance / energy-label evidence where applicable, POTRAZ approval for wireless products, the commercial invoice and packing list, and importer details. An in-country importer / local representative usually handles SAZ filing and customs clearance, since approvals and inspections are commonly tied to a Zimbabwe entity. Confirm the exact pre-shipment vs destination-inspection requirement and any product-specific standard with SAZ and the importer before shipping.
summary.zh: 由于津巴布韦为内陆国，来自中国的 LED 灯具通常经德班（南非）或贝拉（莫桑比克）港口转运并陆运入境，再经津巴布韦税务局（ZIMRA）清关。对于受监管产品类别，SAZ 合格评定或进口检验安排可能在进口时或之前适用；实务文件集通常包括基于 IEC/ZWS 的安全与发射检测报告（IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / CISPR 15 / IEC 62471）、（适用时）性能/能效标签证据、无线产品的 POTRAZ 核准、商业发票与装箱单，以及进口商信息。在地进口商/本地代表通常负责 SAZ 备案与海关清关，因核准与检验常与津巴布韦实体绑定。出货前请与 SAZ 及进口商确认确切的装运前检验 vs 目的地检验要求及任何产品特定标准。
summary.zht: 由於辛巴威為內陸國，來自中國的 LED 燈具通常經德班（南非）或貝拉（莫桑比克）港口轉運並陸運入境，再經辛巴威稅務局（ZIMRA）清關。對於受監管產品類別，SAZ 合格評定或進口檢驗安排可能在進口時或之前適用；實務文件集通常包括基於 IEC/ZWS 的安全與發射檢測報告（IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 / CISPR 15 / IEC 62471）、（適用時）性能/能效標籤證據、無線產品的 POTRAZ 核准、商業發票與裝箱單，以及進口商信息。在地進口商/本地代表通常負責 SAZ 備案與海關清關，因核准與檢驗常與辛巴威實體綁定。出貨前請與 SAZ 及進口商確認確切的裝運前檢驗 vs 目的地檢驗要求及任何產品特定標準。

standards_or_laws: Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) — conformity assessment / import inspection for regulated products
Zimbabwe Revenue Authority (ZIMRA) — customs clearance; landlocked import routing via Durban / Beira

summary.en: In China, the corresponding domestic-market gate is CCC certification (CNCA-C10-01) for in-scope luminaires, conducted by CNCA-authorised bodies such as CQC, plus SRRC for wireless products, with customs handled by the General Administration of Customs (GACC). Chinese exporters are familiar with a single mandatory CCC mark for the domestic market, whereas Zimbabwe relies on SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection tied to ZWS-adopted IEC standards and a local importer — a structurally different, non-mutual route. CCC documentation does not substitute for SAZ import requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，对应的国内市场关口是范围内灯具的 CCC 认证（CNCA-C10-01），由 CQC 等 CNCA 授权机构实施，无线产品另加 SRRC，海关由海关总署（GACC）办理。中国出口商熟悉国内市场的单一强制 CCC 标志，而津巴布韦依赖与 ZWS 采纳的 IEC 标准及本地进口商绑定的 SAZ 合格评定/进口检验——这是结构不同、互不承认的路径。CCC 文件不能替代 SAZ 进口要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，對應的國內市場關口是範圍內燈具的 CCC 認證（CNCA-C10-01），由 CQC 等 CNCA 授權機構實施，無線產品另加 SRRC，海關由海關總署（GACC）辦理。中國出口商熟悉國內市場的單一強制 CCC 標誌，而辛巴威依賴與 ZWS 採納的 IEC 標準及本地進口商綁定的 SAZ 合格評定/進口檢驗——這是結構不同、互不承認的路徑。CCC 文件不能替代 SAZ 進口要求。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (China domestic gate)
General Administration of Customs of China (GACC) — export customs

gap.en: The gap is procedural rather than substance-based: (1) Zimbabwe entry hinges on SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection tied to ZWS-adopted IEC standards, not on a single CE-style or CCC-style mark — CCC certificates are not accepted; (2) a Zimbabwe in-country importer / local representative is practically required to file SAZ approvals and clear customs at ZIMRA; (3) landlocked logistics via Durban / Beira add transit, documentation, and lead-time considerations versus direct-port markets; (4) the precise pre-shipment-inspection vs destination-inspection model and the list of regulated categories must be confirmed with SAZ before shipping to avoid clearance delays. Manufacturers should assemble the ZWS/IEC test-report set plus POTRAZ approval (if wireless) and work through the local importer.
gap.zh: 差距为程序性而非物质性：（1）津巴布韦入境取决于与 ZWS 采纳的 IEC 标准绑定的 SAZ 合格评定/进口检验，而非单一 CE 式或 CCC 式标志——CCC 证书不被接受；（2）实务上须有津巴布韦在地进口商/本地代表办理 SAZ 核准并在 ZIMRA 清关；（3）经德班/贝拉的内陆物流相比直港市场增加转运、文件及交期考量；（4）出货前须与 SAZ 确认确切的装运前检验 vs 目的地检验模式及受监管类别清单，以避免清关延误。制造商应备齐 ZWS/IEC 检测报告集，并（无线产品）加 POTRAZ 核准，通过本地进口商办理。
gap.zht: 差距為程序性而非物質性：（1）辛巴威入境取決於與 ZWS 採納的 IEC 標準綁定的 SAZ 合格評定/進口檢驗，而非單一 CE 式或 CCC 式標誌——CCC 證書不被接受；（2）實務上須有辛巴威在地進口商/本地代表辦理 SAZ 核准並在 ZIMRA 清關；（3）經德班/貝拉的內陸物流相比直港市場增加轉運、文件及交期考量；（4）出貨前須與 SAZ 確認確切的裝運前檢驗 vs 目的地檢驗模式及受監管類別清單，以避免清關延誤。製造商應備齊 ZWS/IEC 檢測報告集，並（無線產品）加 POTRAZ 核准，通過本地進口商辦理。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / procedural — SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection may apply to regulated luminaire categories; an in-country importer and ZWS/IEC test-report documentation are practically required. Confirm the exact route with SAZ before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (domestic) — CCC (CNCA-C10-01) plus SRRC (wireless) gate the Chinese domestic market; not recognised by SAZ

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zimbabwe market entry for LED luminaires is procedural: assemble ZWS/IEC-based safety, emission, and (where applicable) performance test reports plus POTRAZ approval for wireless products, and work through an in-country importer who handles SAZ conformity assessment / import inspection and ZIMRA customs clearance. China CCC certificates are not accepted by SAZ. Landlocked routing via Durban or Beira adds lead time. Confirm the exact pre-shipment vs destination-inspection requirement and regulated-category list with SAZ before shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具进入津巴布韦为程序性：备齐基于 ZWS/IEC 的安全、发射及（适用时）性能检测报告，并为无线产品加 POTRAZ 核准，通过办理 SAZ 合格评定/进口检验及 ZIMRA 清关的在地进口商进行。中国 CCC 证书不被 SAZ 接受。经德班或贝拉的内陆转运增加交期。出货前请与 SAZ 确认确切的装运前检验 vs 目的地检验要求及受监管类别清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具進入辛巴威為程序性：備齊基於 ZWS/IEC 的安全、發射及（適用時）性能檢測報告，並為無線產品加 POTRAZ 核准，通過辦理 SAZ 合格評定/進口檢驗及 ZIMRA 清關的在地進口商進行。中國 CCC 證書不被 SAZ 接受。經德班或貝拉的內陸轉運增加交期。出貨前請與 SAZ 確認確切的裝運前檢驗 vs 目的地檢驗要求及受監管類別清單。
